summary: OtoEkspertiz AI monetization v1.1 tested end-to-end. Backend: 11/13 pytest passing. Credits/reward-ad/IAP/analyze flows all correct — signup grants 3 credits, /credits/me returns integer balance, /credits/packages returns exactly small(3/$1)/medium(10/$3)/large(50/$10), reward-ad is idempotent by ad_session_id (2nd call returns credited:0), IAP verify credits pkg amount and is idempotent by receipt, /analyze atomically deducts 1 credit on success and returns 402 with detail.code='insufficient_credits' when balance=0. CRITICAL: Stripe checkout FAILS — the API key `sk_test_emergent` in backend/.env is rejected by real Stripe API as `Invalid API Key provided`, so POST /api/checkout/create returns 502 (`stripe._error.AuthenticationError`). Both TestStripeCheckout tests failed as a direct result. Frontend: credits-pill renders top-right on home showing balance, tap navigates to /credits screen; on /credits, watch-ad-btn triggers +1 (mock ad), iap-small triggers +3 via mock IAP verify; profile shows credits-card with correct balance and 'Hak Al' CTA. When credits=0, home shows no-credits-warn box and btn-analyze text becomes 'Sorgu Hakkı Al'; tapping (with form filled) correctly routes to /credits. Minor UX bug: analyze button's credit-check runs AFTER form validation, so tapping 'Sorgu Hakkı Al' on an empty form shows misleading 'Marka, model ve yıl zorunludur' instead of routing to /credits.

critical.issue: Stripe rejects the configured API key `sk_test_emergent` with `stripe._error.AuthenticationError: Invalid API Key provided: sk_test_****gent`. Every checkout create returns HTTP 502. The whole Stripe purchase flow is unusable until a real Stripe test key (sk_test_...) is configured in backend/.env, OR the code is switched to use emergentintegrations' Stripe wrapper if that key is meant to work with an Emergent Stripe proxy. Reference: server.py:299 (stripe.checkout.Session.create) + .env:STRIPE_API_KEY=sk_test_emergent.
Untestable because no checkout session can be created (see above). Once Stripe key is fixed, retest polling path.

ui_bugs.issue: When credits=0, tapping btn-analyze on an empty vehicle form shows 'Marka, model ve yıl zorunludur' instead of routing to /credits. The credit check (line 71-74) runs AFTER form validation (line 62-70). Since the button label is 'Sorgu Hakkı Al' (Get Credits), the credit check should run FIRST so the user is taken to the paywall regardless of form state.
Pill text renders as '17sorgu' (no space between number and unit). Minor cosmetic — add a space or margin between the count and the label.

integration_issues.issue: Kart ile (stripe-{pkg}) button cannot open a Stripe session because backend returns 502 (see backend critical). E1 must fix Stripe API key first.

react_native_issues.issue: Persistent console warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' on every render. Non-blocking but should be migrated. Reference: any component passing pointerEvents as a prop.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Stripe integration. Options: (a) replace STRIPE_API_KEY with a real Stripe test secret key (sk_test_51...), or (b) if `sk_test_emergent` is supposed to be routed through emergentintegrations' Stripe wrapper, refactor server.py:299 to use that wrapper instead of the raw `stripe` SDK. Currently the raw SDK hits api.stripe.com and gets rejected.

MEDIUM: In /app/frontend/app/(app)/(tabs)/index.tsx analyze() function, move the `if (credits !== null && credits <= 0)` check BEFORE the form-validation checks so tapping 'Sorgu Hakkı Al' always routes to /credits when balance is 0.
LOW: Add spacing in credits-pill between count and 'sorgu' label (currently renders '17sorgu').
LOW: Migrate `pointerEvents` prop usage to `style.pointerEvents` to silence RN Web deprecation warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to FastAPI lifespan context manager.
server.py:41-42 initializes a DUMMY_HASH at import time — good timing-attack mitigation. Nice.

server.py:200-208 add_credits() writes user update then transaction log non-atomically. If the txn insert fails, the balance drift is silent. Consider MongoDB transactions or writing txn first with pending status.
credits.tsx buyStripe() uses WebBrowser.openAuthSessionAsync which requires app-scheme deep-linking on native; on web it will just close and status polling handles it — OK.
iap/verify endpoint is a stub that accepts ANY non-empty receipt (min 8 chars) as valid — clearly documented as MOCK. Fine for MVP but flag before production.
CORS still allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True — same warning from iteration_1; not fixed.

success_rate.backend: 85% (11/13 — the 2 failures are both Stripe key issue, not test bugs)
success_rate.frontend: 95% (all credit flows work; 1 medium UX bug on analyze button order + cosmetic pill spacing)

seed_data_creation: Registered several TEST_credit_*@oto.com / TEST_drain_*@oto.com users to isolate credit-state tests. Also created a fixed user `test_zero@oto.com / pw12345` with query_credits=0 in MongoDB directly (via motor script) to test the paywall UX. Existing test@oto.com balance grew by +4 during frontend tests (watch-ad +1, iap-small +3), now around 17.
context_for_next_testing_agent: After Stripe key fix, rerun tests in /app/backend/tests/test_credits_v11.py::TestStripeCheckout — both should pass and Stripe session_id should start with 'cs_' with a real Stripe checkout URL. Also re-verify frontend 'Kart ile' button opens a real Stripe hosted checkout. Test user for zero-credit UX: test_zero@oto.com / pw12345 (query_credits=0). Regular test user: test@oto.com / test123 (has ~17 credits).
rca_of_issue: Stripe 502: `sk_test_emergent` is not a valid Stripe API key — Stripe returns `AuthenticationError: Invalid API Key provided: sk_test_****gent`. Backend logs (/var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log) show the AuthenticationError stack. Reproduction: `curl -X POST $BASE/api/checkout/create -H 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"package_id":"small","origin_url":"'$BASE'"}'` → 502. Mitigation: replace STRIPE_API_KEY with a real Stripe test secret OR route through Emergent's Stripe wrapper.
